info.name: Mutell API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for the Mutell API. Fixed for Newman CLI with correct auth propagation, resource ordering, and assertions.

exec: pm.test('Health is ok', () => r.status === 'ok' || r.status === 'healthy' || r.healthy);

item.name: 1 - Auth
item.description: Authentication - login all roles and token operations

item.name: 2 - Plans
item.description: Plan CRUD - must run early to seed plan_id

item.name: 3 - Admin Reads
item.description: Admin read-only operations to seed IDs for downstream requests

item.name: 4 - Terminals
item.description: Terminal CRUD - create before slots so we get an API key. Delete is in Cleanup.

body.raw: {"name":"Newman Test Terminal","description":"Cash register for automated tests","location":"Building A, Floor 1"}

item.name: 5 - Slots
item.description: Slot CRUD - uses terminal API key (raw, no pk_live_ prefix) as Bearer token

body.raw: {"started_at":"2025-01-15T09:30:00Z","ended_at":"2025-01-15T09:35:00Z","raw_text":"Good morning welcome to Fresh Mart how are you doing today great thanks did you find everything you were looking for yes I did okay let me scan these items for you that will be forty two ninety seven would you like to sign up for our rewards program no thanks not today alright your total is forty two ninety seven would you like a bag yes please here you go have a great day","metadata":{"cashier_id":"C001","register":"3"}}
{"slot_id":"{{slot_id}}","content":"Customer interaction was positive, no issues detected."}
{"content":"Updated note: customer was very satisfied with service."}

item.name: 11 - Tenants
item.description: Tenant CRUD - uses {{$timestamp}} for unique slugs

item.name: 12 - AI Configs
item.description: AI configuration CRUD - needs ai_provider_id from Admin Reads

exec: pm.request.body.raw = JSON.stringify({provider_id: pid, model_id: 'gpt-4o', api_key: 'sk-newman-test-key-12345', is_default: false});

item.name: 13 - Admin Writes
item.description: Admin write operations on existing resources

exec: pm.sendRequest({url: pm.environment.get('base_url') + '/api/v1/admin/ai-providers/' + pm.environment.get('ai_provider_id'), method: 'PATCH', header: {Authorization: 'Bearer ' + pm.environment.get('super_admin_token')}}, function(err, res) {});

item.name: 14 - Auth Edge Cases
item.description: Auth edge cases - these intentionally test error paths

item.name: 15 - Cleanup
item.description: Delete resources created during the test run
